title: Reserve Bank of India – Amendment Directions (Unauthorized Transactions and Fraudulent Electronic Banking Transactions) 2026
source_url: Not directly accessible; refer to RBI official notifications portal
description: RBI issued seven Amendment Directions replacing the narrower unauthorized-transaction liability rule with a wider fraudulent-EBT framework. The directions cap complaint resolution at 45/60 days and launch a new small-value fraud compensation scheme, effective January 1, 2027.
